THE REALITY

Every day you're not on page 1, your competitors are stealing your customers

75%

of users never click to page 2

67%

of B2B buyers start with search

3×

more clicks for position 1 vs 3

If your business isn't showing up when customers search, you're invisible. And invisibility costs money — every single day.

THE SOLUTION

I handle everything. You focus on your business.

Technical SEO, content strategy, website optimization, and AI automation. I bring the customers. You run your business.

Technical SEO

Site speed, mobile optimization, schema markup, Core Web Vitals.

Content Strategy

Keyword research, content that ranks, blog posts that convert.

Web Development

Fast, mobile-first, conversion-optimized sites built to rank.

AI Automation

Custom workflows that save you 10+ hours per week.

WHY TRUST ME

You talk to me. I do the work.

RS

RelayStack

Basel, Switzerland · 10+ years experience · 50+ projects

Swiss-based freelance SEO specialist with over 10 years of hands-on experience. Self-taught, not bootcamp. I personally handle every project from strategy to execution. No juniors. No outsourcing.

✓

Technical Expertise

Next.js, Astro, TypeScript, Python, Schema.org

✓

Custom workflows, lead qualification, content generation

Local Market Knowledge

Basel, Zürich, Bern — DACH region expertise

PROCESS

Simple 4-step process

1

Discovery Call

Free 30-min call to understand your goals, analyze competitors, and identify opportunities.

2

Strategy & Quote

Detailed proposal with timeline, deliverables, and transparent pricing. No hidden costs.

3

Build & Optimize

I develop your site with SEO integrated from day one. Weekly updates and milestone reviews.

4

Launch & Scale

Go live with 120-day page 1 guarantee. Ongoing optimization included.

SERVICES

Everything you need to dominate search

Full-stack solutions that combine technical excellence with marketing strategy.

Search Engine Optimization

Technical SEO, on-page optimization, schema markup, and content strategy. I build websites that rank on page 1.

  • ✓ Technical audit & fixes
  • ✓ Keyword research
  • ✓ Schema markup
  • ✓ Core Web Vitals

Web Development

Modern, fast websites that convert visitors into customers. Built with Next.js, Astro, and Tailwind.

  • ✓ Next.js & Astro
  • ✓ Mobile-first design
  • ✓ Conversion optimization
  • ✓ Performance 90+

AI Automation

Automate repetitive tasks and save 10+ hours/week with custom AI workflows.

  • ✓ Email automation
  • ✓ Lead qualification
  • ✓ Content generation
  • ✓ Custom AI agents

AI Platform Optimization

Get found by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI. Build citations that AI systems recommend.

  • ✓ Structured data
  • ✓ E-E-A-T signals
  • ✓ Quotable content
  • ✓ Brand mention strategy

WHY A FREELANCER?

Better than big agencies

I researched the Basel market so you don't have to. Here's how I compare:

Feature RelayStack Big Agencies
Location Basel, Switzerland Zürich, Zug, or abroad
Page 1 Guarantee 120 days None
Entry Price CHF 3,900 one-time CHF 1,500+/month (min. 12 months)
Payment Plans CHF 390/month × 10 Full commitment upfront
Who Does The Work You talk to me — I do the work Account manager → Junior → Outsourced
Response Time Same day 2-3 business days

120-Day Page 1 Guarantee

If your website doesn't reach page 1 within 120 days, I'll refund 100% of your investment. No questions asked.

Terms: No simultaneous work with other SEO agencies. No black-hat tactics.

FAQ

Common questions

Most clients see improvements within 2-4 weeks. I guarantee page 1 rankings within 120 days or you get your money back.

Yes! You can pay in monthly installments (up to 10 months) with no extra fees.

You get a full refund. No questions asked. I only win when you win.

I'm based in Basel, Switzerland and primarily serve the DACH region. I work remotely with clients worldwide.
